dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration trace demonstrates exceptional alignment with governance protocols. The 'governance-context-builder' step successfully validated against the matching schema and produced a high-density output of 8,941 tokens, ensuring all organizational constraints were internalized before the assessment phase.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-assessment' span shows a high degree of analytical rigor. With 10,020 completion tokens and a reasoning intensity of 0.27, the agent provided a more expansive causal analysis than the baseline, effectively tracing the impact of architectural decisions through the system.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The agent effectively surfaced architectural tensions within the assessment flow. The successful schema validation of the complex assessment output indicates that trade-offs were structured logically and resolved within the defined architectural framework, showing improvement over baseline complexity metrics.
